childhood.familyBackground: Son of banker. Family with strong financial and business background in Texas.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 은행가의 아들. 텍사스의 강한 금융 및 사업 배경을 가진 가족
childhood.education: University of Texas (Physics), Stanford University (PhD in Computer Science)
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in Texas with early interest in science and technology. Pursued advanced education in physics and computer science, becoming pioneer in 3D graphics.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 텍사스에서 성장하며 과학 및 기술에 초기 관심. 물리학 및 컴퓨터과학 고등 교육 추구, 3D 그래픽 개척자

careerTimeline.event: Co-founded Netscape Communications with Marc Andreessen
careerTimeline.eventKo: Marc Andreessen과 Netscape Communications 공동 설립

careerTimeline.event: Founded Healtheon and medical information technology ventures
careerTimeline.eventKo: Healtheon 및 의료 정보 기술 벤처 설립

careerTimeline.event: Invested in multiple technology startups and venture capital opportunities
careerTimeline.eventKo: 여러 기술 스타트업 및 벤처캐피탈 기회에 투자

failures.description: SGI struggled with declining market share as PC market matured and competition intensified
failures.descriptionKo: PC 시장 성숙 및 경쟁 심화로 SGI가 시장 점유율 감소에 어려움
failures.lesson: Shifted to venture capital and startup investment, focusing on emerging technologies rather than traditional hardware manufacturing
failures.lessonKo: 벤처캐피탈 및 스타트업 투자로 전환, 전통적 하드웨어 제조보다는 신흥 기술에 집중

quotes.text: Computing is about solving real-world problems with innovative technology
quotes.textKo: 컴퓨팅은 혁신적 기술로 실제 문제를 해결하는 것입니다

recommended.title: The Innovators
recommended.author: Walter Isaacson
recommended.noteKo: 컴퓨팅 역사 및 혁신에 관한 책

personalTraits.knownFor: SGI founder, Netscape co-founder, 3D graphics pioneer, technology entrepreneur
personalTraits.knownForKo: SGI 창립자, Netscape 공동 창립자, 3D 그래픽 개척자, 기술 기업가
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports technology education and Stanford computer science research
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 기술 교육 및 스탠포드 컴퓨터과학 연구 지원
